headlines.headline: Should the NBA get rid of the 65-game eligibility rule?
headlines.description: Vincent Goodwill and David Dennis Jr. debate whether the NBA’s 65-game eligibility rule should be eliminated.

headlines.headline: How Cade Cunningham's injury was better for Pistons in the long run
headlines.description: David Dennis Jr. details how Cade Cunningham missing time because of injury actually benefited the Pistons.

headlines.headline: Goodwill: Knicks are always on the verge of collapse
headlines.description: Vince Goodwill and Monica McNutt discuss what the Knicks need in order to make a deep playoff run.

headlines.headline: Devin Booker scores 37, Suns clinch No. 7 spot in West with a 112-107 win
headlines.description: — Devin Booker scored 37 points, Dillon Brooks added 28 and the Phoenix Suns edged the short-handed Dallas Mavericks 112-107 on Wednesday night.

headlines.headline: How Jaylen Brown turbocharged the Boston Celtics back to title contention
headlines.description: Between memorizing the astrological signs of his teammates and undergoing extreme underwater training, Brown didn't need to be a hero in Boston. He simply needed to lead. "I'm not going to make myself small ever again."

headlines.headline: 2026 NFL draft full order: AFC, NFC team picks in all rounds

headlines.headline: Breaking down Lavonte David's Hall of Fame case
